hero.title: Institutional
hero.subtitle: Access international funding through tokenized corporate bonds and institutional-grade digital asset services

cryptoRails.title: Why International Crypto Rails Matter
cryptoRails.description1: Traditional cross-border payment systems are slow, expensive, and opaque. Crypto rails offer a revolutionary alternative: instant settlement, transparent pricing, and 24/7 availability. For businesses in Latin America, this isn't just convenient—it's transformative.
cryptoRails.description2: With blockchain-based payment rails, LATAM enterprises can access international markets without the traditional barriers. No more waiting 3-5 days for wire transfers. No more losing 3-7% to intermediary fees. No more dealing with banking hour restrictions.
cryptoRails.instantDesc: Transfer value globally in seconds, not days. No more waiting for bank clearances.
cryptoRails.lowerCostsDesc: Save up to 80% on international transfer fees compared to traditional banking.
cryptoRails.globalDesc: Reach any market, any time. True 24/7 financial operations without borders.
cryptoRails.transparentDesc: Every transaction is traceable and verifiable on the blockchain. Complete audit trails.

fundingGap.title: Bridging the LATAM Funding Gap
fundingGap.subtitle: Latin America faces a massive funding gap. We're here to change that.
fundingGap.challenge1Desc: SMEs in LATAM face rejection rates of up to 40% for traditional bank loans, even when creditworthy.
fundingGap.challenge2Desc: Interest rates in LATAM can be 2-3x higher than in developed markets, stifling growth.
fundingGap.challenge3Desc: Local currency depreciation makes international funding risky and unpredictable.
fundingGap.challenge4Desc: Traditional international funding involves mountains of paperwork and months of waiting.
fundingGap.solution1Desc: Access international investors through blockchain-based corporate bonds with transparent pricing.
fundingGap.solution2Desc: Fair, transparent evaluation that looks beyond traditional credit scores to assess true potential.
fundingGap.solution3Desc: Mitigate currency risk with USDC, EURC, and local stablecoins like ECOP for Colombia.
fundingGap.solution4Desc: Complete evaluation and funding in weeks, not months, with full digital workflow.
fundingGap.impactTitle: The Impact of the Funding Gap
fundingGap.stat1Desc: Annual funding shortage for small and medium enterprises
fundingGap.stat2Desc: Cannot access the capital they need to grow
fundingGap.ctaDesc: Join leading LATAM enterprises leveraging blockchain technology for growth

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive institutional DeFi solutions designed for LATAM enterprises

tokenizedBonds.title: Tokenized Corporate Bonds
tokenizedBonds.description: Access international funding through compliant, tokenized corporate bonds. Our comprehensive evaluation process includes Sumsub verification and AI-powered credit scoring.
tokenizedBonds.feature1: AI-generated credit score with NFT certification
tokenizedBonds.feature3: Focus on solid enterprises needing working capital
tokenizedBonds.feature4: Scale your current operations with international funding

treasury.title: Digital Assets Treasury
treasury.description: Seamlessly trade local stablecoins with international stablecoins like USDC and EURC. Manage your digital asset treasury with institutional-grade tools.
treasury.feature1: Easy conversion to USDC and EURC

stablecoins.title: Local Stablecoins for LATAM
stablecoins.description: Introducing ECOP for Colombia, powered by Uniswap V4 and Chainlink oracles. Access localized stablecoins designed for LATAM markets.

otc.title: OTC Services
otc.description: Fast, private, and secure trading of digital assets with our professional traders. Get personalized service for large volume trades.

digitalIds.title: Digital Identity Tiers
digitalIds.description: Progressive verification system with 4 tiers: Private ID, Limited Partners (Individuals & Enterprises), and E-Credit.

eloans.title: E-LOANS
eloans.description: Electronic Credit and Contract services using EIP-4626 framework. Create loans with legal contracts and minimum 12% APY.

realEstateVaults.title: Real Estate Vaults
realEstateVaults.description: Access tokenized real estate investments with institutional-grade properties and transparent on-chain valuations.

p2pai.description: Agentic P2P marketplace where an AI agent acts as trusted arbitrator, holding funds in escrow for secure crypto-fiat trades.

digitalIds.title: Digital Identity Tiers
digitalIds.subtitle: Progressive verification system with 4 tiers of identity verification and compliance

tier1.title: Private ID
tier1.description: Private persistent NFT created using zkPassport that verifies Personhood, age +18, and KYC users using OpenSanctions.

tier2.title: Limited Partners
tier2.description: Enhanced verification for individuals and enterprises

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.description: Verified with Veriff for individual identity validation

enterprises.title: Enterprises
enterprises.description: Verified with Sumsub for business entity validation

tier3.title: E-Credit
tier3.description: AI-powered credit profile using Business Model Information and Financial Information analyzed by an open-source AI model with open criteria.

treasury.title: Treasury Services
treasury.subtitle: All treasury functions require at least Private ID verification

otc.title: OTC Orders
otc.description: Cash-in and cash-out using Telegram, WhatsApp, and Signal. We charge a fixed spread of 1.5% over market price with secure cash delivery.

swaps.title: Swaps with Uniswap V4
swaps.description: Swap and be a liquidity provider in Private Persistent and Compliant Liquidity Pools with Uniswap V4.

monetization.title: Monetization of Local Stablecoins
monetization.description: Redeem and claim local stablecoins powered by Chainlink Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP).

eloans.title: E-LOANS
eloans.subtitle: Electronic Credit and Contract services for verified Tier 3 users
eloans.requirement: Requires Tier 3: Private ID + KYC/KYB + Credit Score

credits.title: E-Credits
credits.description: Users create loans to be fulfilled by counterparties using the EIP-4626 framework standard.

contracts.title: E-Contracts
contracts.description: Each vault must be attached to a predefined contract to activate the loan. Contracts are built from strong legal documents filled by the borrower and signed by the lender.
contracts.feature4: Funds only accessible after lender approval

hero.title: P2P-AI
hero.subtitle: AI-powered peer-to-peer marketplace with automated escrow and trustless arbitration

howItWorks.title: How the Agent Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Autonomous AI agent facilitates secure trades between two parties

step1.title: Order Creation
step1.description: User initiates buy/sell order via Telegram bot with desired amount

step2.title: Agent Quotes Price
step2.description: AI agent fetches CoinGecko rate and applies 0.1% commission spread

step3.title: Funds Transfer
step3.description: User sends fiat or USDC to agent's escrow wallet on Base

step4.title: Agent Verification
step4.description: Agent confirms receipt and initiates counterparty transfer

step5.title: Settlement & Reputation
step5.description: Trade completed, reputation recorded on-chain via ERC-8004

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Built for trust, speed, and security in P2P trading

agent.title: Autonomous AI Agent
agent.description: Coinbase Agentic Wallet on Base acts as neutral arbitrator, eliminating counterparty risk and ensuring fair trade execution.

reputation.title: ERC-8004 Reputation
reputation.description: Immutable on-chain reputation system records all trades and feedback, building trust through transparency.

escrow.title: Smart Escrow System
escrow.description: Funds held securely by agent wallet until both parties confirm, protecting buyers and sellers equally.

telegram.title: Telegram Integration
telegram.description: Seamless trading experience through familiar Telegram interface with instant notifications.

architecture.title: Agent Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Powered by cutting-edge blockchain and AI technology

wallet.title: Coinbase Agentic Wallet
wallet.description: Self-custodial agent wallet on Base for autonomous transaction execution

escrow.title: Escrow Protocol
escrow.description: Smart contract-based escrow ensuring trustless fund custody

pricing.title: Oracle Pricing
pricing.description: Real-time CoinGecko API pricing with transparent 0.1% spread
